signals.headline: Fed Holds Rates Steady at 3
signals.raw:
Fed Holds Rates Steady at 3.5-3.75%; Inflation Remains Elevated, GDP Solid | NO** | **HIGH** confidence

The Federal Reserve's FOMC on March 18, 2026, confirmed it is maintaining the federal funds rate target range at **3½ to 3¾ percent**, citing solid economic activity, low job gains, stable unemployment, and **somewhat elevated inflation**[3]. This decision aligns with Powell's March 19, 2026, r

signals.headline: SEC drops long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, catalyzing XRP's 10% weekly surge to ~$1
signals.raw:
SEC drops long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, catalyzing XRP's 10% weekly surge to ~$1.42 in April 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
